options.label: fig-global-efficacy-forest-NEWEST
options.fig.cap: Efficacy Leaderboard: Treatment performance measured as the percentage deviation from the commercial fungicide Dodine (0% baseline). The dashed red line marks Dodine, while the dashed green line marks the Ethanol Negative Control (C-). Error bars denote standard errors of the estimated marginal means, and numeric labels indicate the absolute calculated PIG Mean for each substance.
